# CWE-334 safe — Small Space of Random Values (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-334-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/base64"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) NamedExec(query string, arg interface{}) error { return nil }

func MintInviteToken(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	buf := make([]byte, 32)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, buf); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	token := base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(buf)
	return db.NamedExec("INSERT INTO invites (token, owner) VALUES (:token, :owner)", map[string]string{
		"token": token,
		"owner": c.Request.URL.Query().Get("owner"),
	})
}
